---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the firmware, bridge, sensors, or documentation build.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment
- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11 / macOS 14)
- **Python version:** (e.g., 3.11.4)
- **MCU board revision:** (e.g., STM32F411 Black Pill v3.1)
- **Connection method:** (e.g., ST-Link V2 / USB-to-TTL)
- **Repo & branch:** (e.g., Mimic-Firmware@main)

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste screenshots or terminal output.

## Additional Context
Any other relevant context — related issues, workarounds tried, etc.
